series_metadata.series_description: Annual reports submitted by county boards of elections that include information on the expense of conducting all elections during the year, type of voting equipment used and cost of maintaining voting equipment.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Reports to be scanned and scans kept permanently. Hard copies may be destroyed after scanning. ; Paper: Reports to be scanned and scans kept permanently. Hard copies may be destroyed after scanning., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
